home.title: Artyom Bordulanyuk — Senior Full-Stack Engineer | System Architecture & Scalable Web Platforms
home.description: Senior Full-Stack Engineer specializing in scalable web architecture, backend reliability, and production-ready system design. Portfolio featuring real-world projects across frontend, backend, DevOps, and real-time platforms.
home.keywords: Artyom Bordulanyuk, Senior Full-Stack Engineer, Full Stack Developer Portfolio, System Architecture, Scalable Web Systems, React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, RabbitMQ, Docker, CI/CD, Web Platform Engineer

summary.intro: Senior Full-Stack Engineer with 5+ years of hands-on experience designing, delivering, and operating scalable, reliable, production-grade web systems.
summary.specialization: I work across the full stack with a strong emphasis on system architecture, backend reliability, and long-term maintainability. My core stack includes React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB, complemented by solid experience in CI/CD automation, containerized deployments, distributed services, and real-time systems.

experience.list1: Designing and operating fault-tolerant backend services behind Nginx with containerized Docker-based infrastructure
experience.list2: Building scalable and maintainable frontend architectures using React and modern UI ecosystems
experience.list3: Implementing secure payment integrations and automated document generation pipelines
experience.list4: Architecting service-oriented and event-driven solutions leveraging Redis and RabbitMQ
experience.list5: Driving system stability and code quality through structured testing strategies and performance optimization

summary.focus: My engineering approach is centered on clean architecture, predictable system behavior, and building solutions that scale effectively with both product complexity and team growth.

details: Delivered multiple production-grade web platforms under NDA, focusing on scalability, reliability, and clean architecture
Designed and implemented real-time dashboards using React, Redux Toolkit, and Socket.io for monitoring, analytics, and operational visibility
Built and operated Node.js backend services with containerized deployments (Docker) behind Nginx reverse proxy and load balancing
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins, including rollback and recovery strategies to improve deployment stability and release safety
Integrated secure payment workflows (Stripe, PayPal) and automated PDF document generation using webhooks and Puppeteer
Improved code quality and release confidence through structured unit and integration testing (Jest, SuperTest) and performance optimizations (asset optimization, lazy loading)
Contributed to full-cycle system delivery including architecture decisions, infrastructure configuration, and production runtime stability
Tech Stack: TypeScript, React, Redux Toolkit, Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, Nginx, Jenkins, Socket.io, Jest, SuperTest, Stripe, PayPal
Designed and developed a custom CRM platform with a focus on scalable and maintainable architecture using Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and React
Built reusable and consistent UI component systems with Ant Design and Bootstrap to support rapid feature delivery
Implemented RESTful APIs with optimized data indexing and migration strategies to support growing datasets and business expansion
Established reliable unit and integration testing workflows using Jest and SuperTest
Managed Docker-based CI/CD deployments to ensure stable, repeatable, and predictable releases
Tech Stack: TypeScript, React, Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, Ant Design, Bootstrap, Docker, Jest, SuperTest
Developed internal administrative dashboards using React, Express.js, and MongoDB
Implemented real-time data synchronization using Socket.io to support live operational updates
Built and maintained RESTful APIs and backend business logic using Node.js
Tech Stack: React, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Socket.io
Led refactoring of legacy frontend codebases using modern React architecture and performance-oriented best practices
Developed responsive and accessible user interfaces with Material-UI, SCSS, and EJS
Ensured cross-browser compatibility and compliance with accessibility standards
Collaborated closely with backend developers to integrate APIs and maintain data consistency across systems
Tech Stack: React, Material-UI, SCSS, EJS
Delivered structured training programs covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React for aspiring developers
Designed practical learning projects and provided individual mentorship to support junior developers’ technical growth
Tech Stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React

hero.name: Decomplex Platform
hero.description: A modular production-grade full-stack platform composed of independently deployable web, admin, mobile, and backend services. Designed around scalable architecture, real-time data flows, and predictable operational behaviour.

components.title: Web Application
components.description: Architected a scalable client application with modular state management, server-driven data flows, and responsive layout strategy. Optimized rendering performance, routing transitions, and user interaction consistency across devices.

components.title: Admin Panel
components.description: Designed an operational management console supporting role-based workflows, analytical dashboards, and configuration pipelines. Implemented structured data visualization and state orchestration for high-density administrative interactions.

components.title: Mobile Application
components.description: Implemented a cross-platform mobile client with offline-aware data handling, push-driven updates, and performance-focused navigation architecture. Ensured consistent experience across varying device capabilities and network conditions.

components.title: Backend API
components.description: Developed a service-oriented API layer handling authentication, caching, background processing, and real-time communication. Structured for containerized deployment, horizontal scaling, and resilient runtime behaviour under concurrent workloads.
